problem_statement.current_ambiguity: The daemon heartbeat record uses status='captured' to indicate that a heartbeat record was written to disk. This is semantically different from 'closing odds were actually fetched and saved'. The field name causes confusion in post-hoc analysis.

p26k_examples.actual_meaning: OddsAPI external closing call did not succeed (quota blocked)

p26k_examples.confused_with: total calls across all sources (TSL + OddsAPI)

problem_statement.investigation_cost: P26K required multiple diagnostic phases to distinguish TSL source absence from OddsAPI quota blockage. A clear schema would have reduced this to one lookup.

current_heartbeat_schema.note: Reconstructed from P26K forensics of daemon_heartbeat.jsonl. Field names approximate.

fields.status: 'captured' — actually means heartbeat written, NOT odds fetched
fields.fetched: boolean — scope: OddsAPI external closing only
fields.api_calls_today: integer — scope: OddsAPI external closing only
fields.trigger_reason: string — free-form, describes why OddsAPI was/wasn't called
fields.next_trigger_minutes: float or null — parsed from trigger_reason via regex

proposed_schema.description: Extended heartbeat schema with unambiguous field semantics. Backward-compatible additions only — no existing field renames.

heartbeat_written.description: True if this heartbeat record was successfully written to disk. Always true when the record exists.

tsl_fetch_attempted.description: True if TSL pre-game list was polled this cycle.

tsl_response_received.description: True if TSL returned a non-empty HTTP response.

tsl_target_games_found.description: Number of target match_ids found in TSL response this cycle. 0 = source empty for targets.

tsl_source_empty_for_targets.description: True if TSL responded successfully but none of the expected target match_ids were in the response.
tsl_source_empty_for_targets.p26k_note: Would have been true for all cycles from 03:39Z onward on 2026-05-21

external_fetch_attempted.description: True if OddsAPI external closing was attempted this cycle.

external_fetch_blocked_by_quota.description: True if OddsAPI call was skipped due to daily quota cap being reached.

external_fetch_success.description: True if OddsAPI returned valid closing data.

external_api_calls_today.description: OddsAPI calls consumed today (scope: OddsAPI only, not TSL).
external_api_calls_today.note: Rename of api_calls_today with explicit scope in field name

closing_odds_captured.description: True only if closing odds data was actually saved for at least one target game. This is the true semantic intent of the old status='captured'.

source_availability_flags.description: Per-source availability summary for this cycle

p26k_retroactive_schema.description: How a closing-window cycle heartbeat would look under the proposed schema
p26k_retroactive_schema.diagnostic_value: With this schema, P26K root cause would be immediately readable from a single heartbeat record. No multi-phase investigation needed.

implementation_note.strategy: Additive only — new fields added to heartbeat record. No existing field removed or renamed. Old consumers reading status/fetched/api_calls_today continue to work.
implementation_note.migration: None required. New fields default to null/false for historical records.
code_change_required_in: daemon heartbeat writer (approximate location: orchestrator/daemon_loop or equivalent)
implementation_note.status: NOT_IMPLEMENTED — paper design only. No code has been modified.
